title: Crotov Boost
description: A top-tier optimization modpack for Minecraft, crafted to boost performance and elevate the overall gameplay experience.
body:
Crotov Boost is your ultimate Minecraft optimization modpack—engineered to elevate performance and deliver stunning visuals. Whether you're aiming to boost FPS, eliminate lag, or enjoy ultra-smooth gameplay, this lightweight yet powerful pack has you covered. Perfect for every Minecraft player, from casual builders to hardcore adventurers.

### ⚠️ Attention 

If you're a content creator making a video about the **Crotov Boost** , please make sure to:

- Provide the Official Link: Share the official Modrinth link in your video description.
- Give Proper Credits: Mention the modpack name and give credits in your video to support its    creators.

### 🔑 Key Features of Crotov Boos

- 🚀 Performance Acceleration
Supercharged by Sodium, Lithium, and ImmediatelyFast, Crotov Boost delivers dramatically higher frame rates, reduced lag, and optimized chunk loading for ultra-smooth gameplay.
- 🎨 Stunning Visuals
Powered by Iris Shaders, immerse yourself in breathtaking lighting, lifelike shadows, and richly enhanced textures that bring your Minecraft world to life.
- ⚙️ System Efficiency
With mods like More Culling, Dynamic FPS, and Entity Culling, your system runs lean—cutting down on unnecessary rendering and conserving resources for peak performance.
- 🛠️ Stability & Reliability
Wave goodbye to memory leaks and lag spikes. Memory Leak Fix and ModernFix ensure a stable, crash-free experience every time you play.
- 🧩 Easy Configuration
Customize your settings effortlessly using the intuitive YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) and Cloth Config API—perfect for both beginners and power users.
- ✨ Extra Enhancements
Enjoy faster chunk processing with Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, cleaner mob visuals via Enhanced Block Entities, and fluid animations thanks to 3D Skin Layers.
- 📦 Preloaded Essentials
Crotov Boost comes bundled with a curated selection of mods, handpicked to deliver the perfect balance of performance and visual excellence.
